notes: Ubuntu's `libjpeg-dev` compatibility package resolves through `libjpeg8-dev` to `libjpeg-turbo8-dev`.
`libturbojpeg` and `libturbojpeg0-dev` expose the TurboJPEG-specific API; `libturbojpeg-dev` is a virtual package provided by `libturbojpeg0-dev`.

runtime_dependents.name: dcm2niix
runtime_dependents.summary: next generation DICOM to NIfTI converter
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Decodes JPEG-compressed DICOM pixel data while converting medical images to NIfTI.

runtime_dependents.name: eog
runtime_dependents.summary: Eye of GNOME graphics viewer program
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Displays JPEG images in the GNOME image viewer.

runtime_dependents.name: gimp
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Opens, edits, and exports JPEG photos and artwork.

runtime_dependents.name: gphoto2
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Downloads and works with JPEG photos from digital cameras.

runtime_dependents.name: krita
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Imports and exports JPEG images in the raster editor and also links to the TurboJPEG API directly.

runtime_dependents.name: libcamera-tools
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Saves or processes JPEG frames in the `cam` and `qcam` camera tools.

runtime_dependents.name: libopencv-imgcodecs406t64
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Provides JPEG decode and encode support in OpenCV image I/O pipelines.

runtime_dependents.name: libreoffice-core
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Imports, renders, and exports JPEG images embedded in office documents, spreadsheets, and presentations.

runtime_dependents.name: libvips42t64
runtime_dependents.summary: image processing system good for very large ones
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Loads and saves JPEG images in high-performance image-processing workloads.

runtime_dependents.name: libwebkit2gtk-4.1-0
runtime_dependents.summary: Web content engine library for GTK
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Decodes and renders JPEG images in embedded web views.

runtime_dependents.name: openjdk-17-jre-headless
runtime_dependents.summary: OpenJDK Java runtime, using Hotspot JIT (headless)
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Provides JPEG codec support for headless Java applications using the standard image APIs.

runtime_dependents.name: python3-pil
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Adds JPEG read and write support to Pillow-based Python code.

runtime_dependents.name: timg
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Uses fast JPEG decoding for terminal image viewing.

runtime_dependents.name: tracker-extract
runtime_dependents.summary: metadata database, indexer and search tool - metadata extractors
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: Reads JPEG metadata and other searchable content during desktop indexing.

runtime_dependents.name: xpra
runtime_dependents.summary: tool to detach/reattach running X programs
runtime_dependents.runtime_functionality: JPEG-compresses remote display updates for forwarded X11 applications.

build_time_dependents.runtime_functionality: Builds in support for decoding JPEG-compressed DICOM images.
Builds in JPEG import and export support, including direct TurboJPEG usage.
Builds in JPEG handling for document import, rendering, and export.
Builds in JPEG codec support for the OpenCV `imgcodecs` module.
Builds in fast JPEG decoding for terminal image display.
Builds in JPEG load and save support for libvips image-processing pipelines.
Builds in JPEG decoding support for GTK web views.
Builds in JPEG-compressed transport for remote X11 session updates.
